ideation: This animation sequence depicts a student thoughtfully studying. The sequence begins with the arms relaxed at the sides, then moves to holding a book, and ends with a hand supporting the chin in contemplation. Frame 1 shows a neutral pose, Frame 2 shows both arms raised as if holding a book, Frame 3 shows one arm supporting the chin.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready to study
both arms lift to cradle an unseen book
left hand rises to chin, lost in thought
